patterns.platform_specific: Use #[cfg(target_os = "macos")] for macOS-only code, #[cfg(target_os = "linux")] for Linux
patterns.async_spawning: Use std::thread::spawn for OS threads, tokio::spawn for tokio tasks
patterns.channel_communication: Use tokio::sync::watch::Sender/Receiver for broadcasting state changes
patterns.exit_code_convention: Exit code 75 = transient failure (already used for rate-limiting)
patterns.adapter_pattern: Nushell scripts in adapters/, take 5 args: workdir, prompt_file, stdout_log, stderr_log, memory_out
patterns.error_detection: Check stderr content for network patterns, map to exit code 75
patterns.provider_config: providers.json at cards_dir root, has rate_limit_exit field and env map

existing_implementations.description: Exit code 75 handling already exists for rate-limiting; reaper.rs handles orphan recovery; adapters already detect '429' and 'rate limit' in stderr

platform_constraints.macos: IOKit power notifications MUST run on dedicated OS thread (not tokio task) to avoid sleep transition hangs
platform_constraints.linux: Use zbus for D-Bus logind PrepareForSleep signal, or stub if not feasible
